meta.source: Backfilled from MPR history (last 6 months) + Boss's DISC reading + Decalogue retros
meta.notes: Stage 1 MVP. Stats are initial estimates calibrated to leave room for progression — not retroactive perfection. Update events as MPRs are completed.
meta.stage: 2 — merged with MPR history + parsed events

Capacitor.vibe: Precise, stores knowledge, releases on demand

characters.name: Răzvan Onofrei
characters.art_prompt: A figure made of crackling capacitor coils and lightning, holding a blueprint glowing with circuitry. Dark workshop, blue-white electric arcs.
characters.notes: Top 3 principles: Deliver Value (3), Craftsmanship (4), Extreme Ownership (1). Outcome + standards + ownership. Lider tehnic pe impact și disciplină.

passive_boosts.rationale: DISC overlap on C,D. Compatible leadership style boosts growth.
DISC overlap on D. Compatible leadership style boosts growth.
DISC overlap on C,D. Compatible leadership style boosts growth.

characters.name: Anca Croitoriu
characters.art_prompt: A regal figure surrounded by hourglasses being closed shut, lightning crackling around closed contracts. Cold blue palette.
characters.notes: Principles: Extreme Ownership (1) → Stop Starting Start Finishing (6) → Seek Truth (7). Execuție, finishing, claritate. Nu tolerează WIP excesiv.

passive_boosts.rationale: DISC overlap on C,D. Compatible leadership style boosts growth.

characters.name: Denis Oproescu
characters.art_prompt: A figure made of bridging electric arcs connecting two distant towers, gold and warm electric tones, charisma personified.
characters.notes: I/D (deduced from limited 360 — only Razvan↔Denis feedback exists). Bridges THG ↔ Thinslices. Only leader who can boost Andreea (I match).

characters.name: Dănuț Diac
characters.art_prompt: A commanding figure on a stormy cliff, lightning surging from raised hand, captain's coat with circuit patterns, navy and electric blue.
characters.notes: CTO THG. D/C — execution + technical depth. Manages .NET THG team in parallel (Robert Pasniceanu reports here).

characters.name: Ivona Apostol
characters.art_prompt: A baker's apron over military fatigues, lightning whisk in one hand, recipe scroll in the other, golden hour kitchen with electric ovens.
characters.notes: Principles: Extreme Ownership (1) → Team Sport (2) → Marathon (5). Recipe-keeper, process enforcer. D/S = action + team. Drill Sergeant fits how she ensures the recipe gets followed.

characters.name: Andrei Clim
characters.art_prompt: A heavy-armored warrior with electric shoulder pads, shield made of welded circuit boards, taking hits from a swarm of bug-icons, exhausted but standing.
characters.notes: Principles: Seek Truth (7) → Fix System Not Person (9) → Team Sport (2). Truth-seeker, challenges constructively. Tank class: takes too much ownership → burnout risk. Marathon score low intentionally.

characters.name: Ilie Lupu
characters.art_prompt: A silent assassin in a hoodie sleeve made of high-voltage pipeline, raining lightning damage on towers of code-blocks, minimalist menacing energy.
characters.notes: Principles: Extreme Ownership (1) → Leave Cleaner (5) → Learn Fast Teach Faster (8). Talks little, ships big. Weakness: ownership/carelessness on details. AD Carry: massive damage but needs team coverage.

characters.name: Mihai Bojescu
characters.art_prompt: A wizard in a long robe of stitched-together printed circuit boards, conjuring symbols from arcane documentation, surrounded by floating runes that look like code AST nodes.
characters.notes: Principles: Team Sport (2) → Craftsmanship (4) → Leave Cleaner (5). C/S — Boss leans toward C primary (process/precision visible in MPRs). Mage: deep research, mysterious solutions, helps too many. Slow but lossless.

passive_boosts.rationale: DISC overlap on C. Compatible leadership style boosts growth.

characters.name: Demetriad Sinzeanu
characters.art_prompt: A cheerful beetle-armored figure with antenna lightning rods, friendly grin, carrying first-aid kit full of stickers and snacks, warm sunset palette.
characters.notes: Principles: Team Sport (2) → Deliver Value (3) → Marathon (10). Friendly, support-oriented, can be sloppy on craftsmanship. S/C with low diligence score = team glue but execution gaps.

passive_boosts.rationale: DISC overlap on C. Compatible leadership style boosts growth.

characters.name: Andreea Bejan
characters.art_prompt: A young apprentice in soft pastel robes with sparkles forming around her hands, shy but hopeful expression, dawn light, sparks of color floating around.
characters.notes: Principles: Team Sport (2) → Deliver Value (3) → Learn Fast Teach Faster (8). Junior. Introvert with potential waiting to unleash. STRUCTURAL RISK: only Denis (Arc/I match) gives her a boost — needs cultivation.

passive_boosts.rationale: DISC overlap on I. Compatible leadership style boosts growth.

characters.name: Benjammin Frankly
characters.art_prompt: A sharp-suited spectral figure made of glowing terminal text and crackling neon, holding a clipboard of TODOs, half-smirk, vaguely film noir lighting.
characters.notes: Cover identity: Răzvan's assistant. Reality: Outfit operator, private to Boss. Never appears in Thinslices wire under Outfit framing. Sharp, sarcastic, useful. The Mouth.
